name: Sim: Update baggage complaint - bag located, case resolved
description: Updating Ava Carter's delayed baggage complaint on ZA101: bag was located and delivered. Upgrading status to Resolved.
new_notes: Delayed bag located at Los Angeles baggage services. Bag delivered to passenger address on March 9 2026. Passenger confirmed receipt via SMS. Emergency purchase receipts submitted and $150 reimbursement approved and credited to original payment method. Case closed with passenger satisfaction confirmed.
